summary: Good‑quality recording with pleasant highs and a fun May ’80s show, though not as upfront as the comparable Kaplansky tape
review: The reviewer rates this tape four stars, noting clear high frequencies and overall presence that make it a solid, listenable document. While the mix isn’t as forward‑facing as another well‑known May 1980 source, the performance itself is described as fun and representative of the band’s strong shows from that period.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 ★) highlights decent sound quality and an enjoyable show; lack of detailed song or performance commentary keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good highs and presence, but less upfront compared to a similar May‑80s recording; overall clear and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply describes the show as fun and representative of May ’80 performances.
